name: Saturn Drishti on 4th House — Unstable Property
description: Saturn's aspect (drishti) on the 4th house creates instability in property matters — delays, legal issues, structural problems, or forced sale potential.

source_text.quote: If Saturn aspects the 4th house, the native suffers delays in property acquisition, faces structural issues, and may lose property through adversity.

required: Saturn aspects the 4th house through Vedic drishti (3rd/7th/10th aspect)
optional: Saturn is a functional malefic for the ascendant
Saturn is debilitated or in enemy sign
No benefic aspects counter Saturn's drishti

interpretation.meaning: Saturn's drishti on 4th house creates a quality overlay of instability — property acquired during active periods may face structural issues, legal disputes, or delayed possession. Does NOT prevent acquisition but classifies it as unstable.

metadata.notes: Quality modifier only — does not affect timing. Adds 'unstable' flag to property events. Advise thorough legal/structural verification.

name: Mars in 4th House — Conflict Over Property
description: Mars placed in the 4th house indicates conflict, disputes, and aggressive energy surrounding property matters — litigation, boundary disputes, or family conflicts over real estate.

source_text.quote: Mars in the 4th house creates disputes over lands and houses, conflicts with neighbors, and aggression in property dealings.

required: Mars is placed in the 4th house
optional: Mars is afflicted by other malefics

interpretation.meaning: Mars in 4th creates aggressive/conflicting energy around property. Property acquisition may involve disputes, litigation, or family conflicts. Quality is 'disputed' even if timing supports acquisition.

metadata.notes: Mars in 4th is called 'Manglik Dosha for property' — creates ongoing conflicts. Property still acquired but with disputes.

name: 4th Lord with Benefics — Comfortable Property Acquisition
description: When the 4th lord is conjunct or aspected by natural benefics, property acquisition proceeds smoothly with comfort, satisfaction, and good quality — the property brings happiness.

source_text.quote: If the 4th lord is conjoined with or aspected by benefics, the native acquires property easily and enjoys great domestic comfort and happiness.

required: 4th lord is conjunct or aspected by natural benefics (Jupiter/Venus/Mercury/waxing Moon)
optional: 4th lord is in a kendra house

interpretation.meaning: 4th lord blessed by benefics ensures property acquisition is smooth, comfortable, and satisfying. The property itself will be of good quality and bring lasting happiness.

metadata.notes: Positive quality modifier. Property acquired under this yoga is generally problem-free and brings domestic happiness.

name: 11th from 6th House Activation — Mortgage/Loan Property
description: The 11th house from the 6th (which is the 4th house itself) when activated by debt indicators suggests property acquired through mortgage, loan, or financial obligation.

source_text.quote: The 4th house being 11th from 6th indicates gains through debts — property acquired through loans and mortgages is indicated when 6th lord connects to 4th.

required: 6th lord is connected to 4th house or 4th lord (conjunction/aspect/placement)
optional: Rahu is involved in the connection

interpretation.meaning: 6th lord connected to 4th indicates property through debt/mortgage. This is neither positive nor negative in modern context — most property is purchased through loans. Classifies mode as 'debt_heavy'.

metadata.notes: In modern context, mortgage is normal. This quality modifier indicates heavy financial commitment. Not necessarily negative.

name: 5th from 4th House (8th House) Activation — Value Appreciation
description: The 5th house from 4th (which is the 8th house) when benefically influenced indicates property value appreciation, hidden gains, and profitable investment outcomes.

source_text.quote: The 8th house being 5th from 4th indicates fortune in property — benefics here show property value grows manifold over time.

required: Benefics (Jupiter/Venus) placed in or aspecting the 8th house (5th from 4th)
optional: No malefic conjunction with the benefic in 8th

interpretation.meaning: 8th house (5th from 4th = fortune of property) with benefics indicates property value appreciates significantly. The investment proves highly profitable over time.

metadata.notes: Derived house analysis. 5th from 4th = fortune/speculation of property. Benefics here = property appreciates.

name: Malefic in 4th House — Destruction/Renovation Needed
description: Natural malefics (Saturn/Mars/Rahu/Ketu) in the 4th house without benefic aspects indicate property that needs renovation, has structural damage, or faces destruction risk.

source_text.quote: If malefics unaspected by benefics occupy the 4th house, the native's property faces destruction, fire, or structural failure requiring rebuilding.

required: Natural malefics (Saturn/Mars/Rahu/Ketu) in 4th house without benefic aspects

interpretation.meaning: Unaspected malefics in 4th indicate property with damage/destruction potential. Property may need significant renovation or may face natural calamity risk.

metadata.notes: Quality modifier for property condition. Does not prevent purchase but warns about structural issues. Recommend thorough inspection.

name: Saturn-Mars Neecha Bhanga — Unexpected Property Through Hardship
description: When Saturn and Mars are involved in Neecha Bhanga Rajayoga (cancellation of debilitation), the native acquires property unexpectedly through hardship, persistence, and overcoming obstacles.

source_text.quote: Neecha Bhanga of property karakas Saturn and Mars indicates property acquisition after struggle — the native gains lands through persistence after initial setbacks.

required: Saturn or Mars is debilitated with cancellation (Neecha Bhanga)
The debilitated planet is connected to 4th house or 4th lord
optional: Jupiter aspects the Neecha Bhanga planet
The planet is in kendra from Moon or Lagna
Dispositor of debilitated planet is in kendra

interpretation.meaning: Neecha Bhanga of property karakas (Saturn/Mars) creates 'rags to riches' property yoga. Initial hardship and setbacks eventually lead to significant property acquisition through persistence.

metadata.notes: Neecha Bhanga creates unexpected reversals. Property comes after struggle but may be of significant value. Patience is key.

name: Exalted Jupiter Aspecting 4th — Premium Real Estate
description: Jupiter exalted (in Cancer) and aspecting the 4th house indicates acquisition of premium, high-value real estate — the native owns the finest properties in prime locations.

source_text.quote: If Jupiter is exalted and aspects the 4th house, the native possesses the finest residences in prime locations, with property of the highest quality.

required: Jupiter aspects the 4th house (5th/7th/9th aspect from Jupiter's position)

interpretation.meaning: Exalted Jupiter aspecting 4th house is the highest quality indicator for real estate. The native acquires premium properties in the best locations with excellent appreciation potential.

metadata.notes: Highest quality yoga for property. Exalted Jupiter = maximum benefic influence. Properties acquired are of exceptional quality and value.
